title: OpenBMB/VoxCPM offers open multilingual voice generation and cloning
friendlyTitle: VoxCPM is an open voice AI project
summary: VoxCPM2 is an open-source, tokenizer-free text-to-speech system for multilingual speech generation, voice design, controllable voice cloning, and streaming audio. The project supports 30 languages, 48kHz output, and commercial-ready Apache-2.0 licensing.
friendlySummary: VoxCPM2 can create realistic speech in many languages, design voices from descriptions, and clone voices with controls.
whyItMatters: Developers can prototype voice agents, multilingual narration, accessibility features, and synthetic voice workflows without depending entirely on closed voice APIs. Its streaming support makes it relevant for real-time conversational interfaces.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help developers build voice assistants, narration tools, and accessibility features using an open-source voice model.
